# vector: cal_read
# CAL_READ：按 (addr,type) 读 3 条
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 56120007001a00030012a000000400000044a000000100000046a0000000000000c284076b
wire: 0356120207021a02030312a001020401010344a001020101010346a0010101010105c284076b00
